problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: Combining Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
